reviews.review_description: Fantastic game, gives a lot of joy. Very well done gameplay and getting into positions. It's great that there is a commentator, thanks to which you can feel the atmosphere of the stadium. Special effects and the radar display are really great. You can build your own team, or choose an existing one. Leagues and tournaments are also great.

A great game that lets you get tired. I didn't think a VR game could make you tired. My son and I play often and I'm glad he finally got off the couch. The game itself is very realistic. You can feel the atmosphere of the stadium, the fans and the commentator are great. I love the possibility of crossing or scoring goals. Who didn't dream of doing this as a child? It's great that you can build your team and play in the championship.

reviews.review_title: This game has so many advantages
reviews.review_description: This game has so many advantages, great gameplay, good movement from player to player, great getting into position, you can kick with your foot or play with buttons, you can turn on assists that help in the game or special effects. And the coolest thing is the leagues and tournaments that allow you to win cups.
I really didn't expect it to be such a cool game. The kicking feeling is really good, it feels like you're actually playing. I don't know how they did it, but it's a great job.

reviews.review_title: it feels like playing real football
reviews.review_description: The feeling of kicking a ball is very nice, it feels like playing real football. I can finally create my own team, where all my buddies play.

developer_response.body: Oh, we are very sad that you don't like the game. We understand, that this game sometimes require more training and settings adjustments before it will be really enjoyable. At any point you can join us on Discord, suggest improvements, ask for help or see how others are playing and enjoying.

reviews.review_description: Very difficult to play don’t recommend it

developer_response.body: Oh, we are very sad that you don't like the game. We understand, that this game sometimes require more training and settings adjustments before it will be really enjoyable. At any point you can join us on Discord, suggest improvements, ask for help or see how others are playing and enjoying.

reviews.review_description: I usually don't review games, but I see that most comments are pretty old. First of all, I played two football (soccer) games from this developer. One is called Football, the other Soccer. And this one is cheaper one, so you may expect it to be much worse, but is it? If it comes to gameplay it seems both have same mechanics. But the other has commentator, kicking with foot, hands and buttons (this one has buttons only), there are also better training options in the other. referees, reserves + manager, profiles. Both have elastic net, HUD (which I love), some special effects, tons of settings. So which one to choose? I will choose Soccer, just because I love the feeling of kicking ball with foot/hand and comentator is really funny. But if you prefer playing with buttons, then perhaps you can select cheaper option. And to be honest, both are super cheap and give a lot of fun. This game is 4 start to me, but I give 5 because I just completely disagree with some of the old comments here. I recommend reading my Soccer review, it contains tips that are useful here as well.
I needed to change settings so I could shot from longer distance. That should be default. Other than that it feels pretty good.

I recently looked at this game again and there are so many changes. 
I was able to modify some AI parameters and the game become completely different. 
There is probably more than 40 different gameplay settings that can be changed.

It feels really nice playing 11-11 games with AI. There are also some other small games. I would say, that at the beginning it's a bit confusing on how the switching between players works, but after some time I understand the intention and I've just got used to it. BTW. I have other game from this Developer.
I bought it for my husband and he enjoys it a lot.

reviews.review_title: I recommend starting with easy level
reviews.review_description: Select team, formation, difficulty and play the match - that all it is there. Is it enough? Oh my, I felt like a real football player. The moment ball hits the net and the crowd makes noise is a fantastic feeling. But don't make the mistake, start with easy and get used to the mechanics. At the beginning you don't know what is happening. But at the moment you realise, that you are just teleported to a different player location, everything starts making sense. Look at the player to which you're passing, because you will become this player immediately. And I prefer rotation with legs, not thumbstick. Game has also sometimes some funny issues, like ball stops rotation for a while - but this is acceptable, I suppose it will be fixed.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the comment. Please report the problems, even very funny :), to our Discord channel. Recording will be useful.
